basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala Community Mobilizer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Management Development (CMD) Community Mobilizer Notification 2026 has been released on 21 May 2026 on the official website of CMD. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CMD Kerala Community Mobilizer Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CMD Kerala Community Mobilizer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMD Community Mobilizer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Community Mobilizer post is 27th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Community Mobilizer post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have completed Plus-Two or an equivalent examination to be eligible for the Community Mobilizer position at CMD.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Community Mobilizer role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Community Mobilizer post is 30 years. There is no minimum age specified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Community Mobilizer position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Community Mobilizer role will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 15,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Community Mobilizer job at CMD?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Community Mobilizer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Community Mobilizer position involves a Proficiency Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category, including General and OBC candidates, for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Community Mobilizer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Community Mobilizer in this recruitment drive by the Centre for Management Development.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Community Mobilizer position?
faq.answer: The Community Mobilizer position is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Centre for Management Development located?
faq.answer: The Centre for Management Development (CMD) is located in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, with the pincode 695014.
